/usr/bin/c++  -std=c++11 -g -rdynamic -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/unittests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/unittests.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unittests.dir/home/runner/work/dsstne/dsstne/src/amazon/dsstne/utils/NetCDFhelper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unittests.dir/home/runner/work/dsstne/dsstne/src/amazon/dsstne/utils/Utils.cpp.o -o unittests  -lcppunit -lnetcdf -lnetcdf_c++4 -lnetcdf -lnetcdf_c++4
